title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: SpaceX aborts Starship Flight 13 launch attempt
summary:
SpaceX aborted the launch of its latest Starship test flight July 16 when some of the vehicle’s engines failed to ignite.
The post SpaceX aborts Starship Flight 13 launch attempt appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: Citadel Securities invests $400M in Crypto.com at $20B valuation
summary: Crypto exchanges have increasingly positioned themselves as bridges between digital asset markets and traditional finance.

title: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition
summary: The company didn't immediately say what went wrong. SpaceX's stock plunged more than 4% in after-hours trading before paring losses.

title: SpaceX launches 21 satellites for military data network
summary:
With the launch of 21 York Space Systems satellites, the Space Development Agency has now placed half of its planned Tranche 1 Transport Layer constellation in orbit
The post SpaceX launches 21 satellites for military data network  appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her ‘Mafia’ skills)
summary: Ryan Beiermeister, who demonstrated cool analysis in the Founders Fund YouTube series "Mafia," has joined the firm as a partner.

title: Injective files for SEC transfer agent registration to bring securities ownership records onchain
summary: The company said the filing would create a regulated pathway for maintaining ownership records for tokenized securities onchain.

title: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
summary: Mira Murati's Inkling won't dethrone the best Chinese open-weights models, but it gives Western developers something they haven't yet had.

title: Tradable’s $1B Stellar deal adds to institutional tokenization boom
summary: Tradable will bring up to $1 billion in private credit assets to Stellar, extending the blockchain’s push into institutional finance and tokenized real-world assets.

title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
summary: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.

title: OpenAI Uses AI Red Team to Strengthen GPT-5.6 Against Prompt Injection Attacks
summary: OpenAI said its new automated red-teaming model, GPT-Red, uncovered vulnerabilities that were used to make GPT-5.6 more resistant to prompt injection attacks.

title: BlackRock, Goldman, and JP Morgan Will Give Tokenized Stocks a Try
summary: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation is working with nearly 40 financial firms in a pilot to test tokenized stocks and U.S. treasuries.

title: 小紅書前員工跨境實名舉報，傳聞中的赴港上市計劃會有變化嗎？
summary: 一名自稱是小紅書的前員工聲稱已向香港監管機構實名舉報公司或存在合規問題。學者向BBC中文分析，若涉及系統性問題，或有機會影響上市進程。
